active_cycle.goal: Prepare the repository for real smart-home evidence execution while preserving sample-vs-real and production-claim boundaries.

tasks.title: Sync STATUS and Issue 8
tasks.objective: Update STATUS.md and Issue #8 to reflect P0 semantic gate completion, current schema versions, and real evidence requirements.
allowed_work: Update STATUS.md current phase and completed foundation.
Update Issue #8 body or add a structured comment with current packet schema, evidence requirements, and validation commands.
Preserve all release-boundary prohibitions.
forbidden_work: Do not claim real evidence has been submitted.
Do not start the real pilot.
Do not mark Issue #8 complete.
acceptance_criteria: STATUS reflects main branch and P0 semantic gates as merged.
Issue #8 references the current evidence intake schema and sample-vs-real rules.
CI passes for any repo file change.

critique_findings: Initial branch update left RQ-0001/status_issue_sync as in_progress after Issue #8 comment was posted.
Small in-scope correction applied by marking RQ-0001 and status_issue_sync completed.
completion.boundary: No real evidence was claimed, no real pilot was started, and Issue #8 remains open.

tasks.title: Define Issue-to-Packet bridge
tasks.objective: Create a bounded mapper specification for converting Issue #8 evidence into EVIDENCE_INTAKE_PACKET.submitted.json without silently inventing missing evidence.
allowed_work: Add a mapper contract or guide for issue fields to packet fields.
Define required failure modes for missing attachments, missing hashes, privacy omissions, and sample markers.
Add validation fixtures if a machine-readable mapping contract is introduced.
forbidden_work: Do not scrape or infer evidence that is not present.
Do not auto-generate a submitted packet from incomplete Issue text.
Do not bypass privacy review.
acceptance_criteria: Mapping has explicit blocked states for missing or conflicting evidence.
No text-only issue field is treated as proof of a visual artifact.
Sample-vs-real safety is preserved.

critique_findings: The bridge must not make Issue #8 text equivalent to screenshot, export, DOM, CSS, accessibility, or live-render evidence.
The bridge must keep missing attachments, missing hashes, privacy omissions, conflicts, and sample markers as blocking states.
Because completing RQ-0002 leaves fewer than four pending tasks, one bounded follow-up task was added after the fifth refresh task.
completion.boundary: No submitted packet was generated, no real evidence was claimed, and the real pilot remains blocked.

tasks.title: Add conflict summary to readiness path
tasks.objective: Add an evidence_conflict_summary requirement to readiness or related artifacts so unresolved conflicts remain visible and blocked downstream.
allowed_work: Extend readiness/conflict artifacts or docs with conflict summary fields.
Add semantic checks for unresolved conflict carry-forward.
Add negative fixtures for hidden unresolved conflicts.
forbidden_work: Do not resolve conflicts by source priority without recording the decision.
Do not allow unresolved conflicts to become visible flags if they are blockers.
Do not loosen existing readiness gates.
acceptance_criteria: Unresolved blocking conflict cannot produce ready readiness.
Resolved conflict records source priority and rationale.
CI validates positive and negative paths.

critique_findings: The readiness path previously exposed blocking_reasons and visible_flags but had no durable conflict summary field.
A hidden unresolved conflict could be omitted from a downstream report unless unresolved conflict count was made schema-visible.
Resolved conflict records now require source priority, winning source, rationale, and downstream effect.
completion.boundary: No conflict was resolved without rationale, no pilot was started, and no real evidence was claimed.

tasks.title: Prepare real pilot artifact slots
tasks.objective: Create non-generated placeholder paths or templates for real submitted artifacts without pretending real evidence exists.
allowed_work: Add templates for submitted packet, readiness report, failure map, risk assessment, repair plan, and final audit paths if missing.
Document exact commands for submitted mode.
Keep placeholders clearly marked as templates, not evidence.
forbidden_work: Do not commit runtime .generated.json outputs.
Do not fabricate screenshots, hashes, or Elementor export data.
Do not mark pilot authorized.
acceptance_criteria: Templates cannot pass as real submitted evidence.
Commands distinguish sample dry-run from real submitted mode.
Generated output policy remains enforced.

critique_findings: Submitted-mode commands were documented as expected command shape only.
Unsupported submitted-mode flags remain a blocker, not permission to use sample fixtures.
One bounded backlog task was added because only three pending tasks remained.
completion.boundary: Template-only; no generated submitted outputs; no real pilot authorization.

tasks.title: Refresh rolling queue
tasks.objective: Audit the previous four tasks, update priorities, and write the next four bounded tasks plus the next queue-refresh task.
allowed_work: Review PRs and CI results for RQ-0001 through RQ-0004.
Mark completed, blocked, skipped, or superseded tasks accurately.
Add the next four pending tasks and a fifth queue-refresh task.
forbidden_work: Do not hide failed or partial tasks.
Do not schedule real pilot execution unless real evidence and readiness pass.
Do not remove release-boundary prohibitions.
acceptance_criteria: Queue has at least four pending executable tasks after refresh unless blocked on evidence.
Every fifth task remains queue_refresh.
Completed task history and blockers are preserved.

critique_findings: The refresh must preserve completed history for RQ-0001 through RQ-0004 instead of rewriting or compressing it.
The next executable backlog needs four pending tasks before the next queue-refresh task.
Schema compatibility remains deliberately assigned to RQ-0008 and was not folded into this refresh.
completion.boundary: No real pilot was scheduled, no real evidence was claimed, and release-boundary prohibitions remain in force.

tasks.title: Add bridge semantic validation runner
tasks.objective: Add a dedicated E2E check for the issue-to-packet bridge so unsafe mappings fail outside generic schema validation.
allowed_work: Create validation/e2e/run_issue_to_packet_bridge_check.py.
Check that blocked bridge states keep real_pilot_allowed_to_start=false.
Check that text-only visual proof and sample markers remain rejected.
forbidden_work: Do not generate a submitted packet.
Do not relax the bridge schema.
Do not mark Issue #8 evidence as complete.
acceptance_criteria: Dedicated validator passes for valid blocked mapping.
Dedicated validator rejects unsafe mapping cases.
CI includes the dedicated bridge check if workflow editing is safe.

critique_findings: The first artifact write targeted a non-existent branch and failed safely.
A temporary probe file was accidentally created on main while checking write behavior; it was immediately removed before continuing.
The bridge semantic check must assert pilot blocking and unsafe text-only visual proof behavior without generating a submitted packet or treating Issue #8 as complete.
completion.boundary: No submitted packet was generated, no real evidence was claimed, Issue #8 remains evidence-pending, and the real pilot remains blocked.

tasks.title: Add conflict-summary generated-report check
tasks.objective: Add a focused check proving a generated readiness report with intake blocker_conflicts becomes blocked_conflicting_evidence and carries conflict records forward.
allowed_work: Add or reuse a blocked-conflict intake fixture.
Assert generated readiness_status=blocked_conflicting_evidence.
Assert unresolved conflict records cannot authorize pilot start.
forbidden_work: Do not authorize pilot execution.
Do not treat sample conflict fixtures as real evidence.
Do not weaken missing-evidence or privacy blockers.
acceptance_criteria: Generated readiness from a conflicting intake verdict blocks pilot start.
Conflict summary record count matches blocker_conflicts.
CI validates the generated negative path if workflow editing is safe.

tasks.title: Harden rolling queue schema compatibility
tasks.objective: Update the rolling queue schema in a small bounded PR so it accepts the current queue lifecycle states and cycle positions without weakening validation.
allowed_work: Update schemas/ev4-responsive-rolling-queue.schema.json to reflect current lifecycle states.
Add or update queue fixtures for more than five tasks.
Keep run_rolling_queue_check.py in CI.
forbidden_work: Do not loosen validation enough to accept malformed task records.
Do not remove the every-fifth queue_refresh invariant.
Do not change completed task history.
acceptance_criteria: Current planning/EV4_ROLLING_QUEUE.json validates against the hardened schema.
Malformed queue records still fail validation.
CI passes with run_rolling_queue_check.py enabled.

tasks.title: Add submitted-mode command support
tasks.objective: Close the documented submitted-mode command gap by adding bounded CLI handling for real submitted packet paths while preserving sample rejection rules.
allowed_work: Add explicit --packet path handling for submitted evidence checks where missing.
Add a negative check proving sample fixtures cannot pass as submitted evidence.
Document the supported command shape in the relevant pilot readiness or artifact-slot doc.
forbidden_work: Do not create or infer a submitted packet.
Do not run the real pilot.
Do not weaken sample-vs-real rejection.
acceptance_criteria: A caller can point validators at a submitted packet path without using sample defaults.
Sample fixtures remain rejected in submitted mode.
CI covers the submitted-mode safety path.

tasks.title: Refresh rolling queue after validation hardening set
tasks.objective: Audit RQ-0006 through RQ-0009, preserve completed history, reprioritize blockers, and write the next four bounded tasks.
allowed_work: Review merged PRs and CI outcomes for RQ-0006 through RQ-0009.
Carry forward unresolved blockers without hiding partial work.
Add the next four pending tasks and the following queue-refresh task.
forbidden_work: Do not schedule real pilot execution unless real evidence and readiness pass.
Do not remove sample-vs-real boundaries.
Do not mark schema or validator work complete without merged evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Every fifth task remains queue_refresh.
At least four pending executable tasks remain after refresh unless blocked on evidence.
Completed task history and blockers are preserved.
